abilities.name: Maul

If you roll a 1-3, all adjacent figures are safe. If you roll a 4-15, each adjacent figure receives 2 wounds. If you roll a 16-19 each adjacent figure receives 4 wounds. If you roll a 20, each adjacent figure receives 8 wounds. After using this power, Deathwalker is always destroyed.

abilities.name: Stealth Dodge

Deathwalker can be affected by his own Explosion Special Attack.

abilities.name: Hide in Darkness
abilities.description: If a Deepwyrm Drow is attacked with a normal attack and at least 1 skull is rolled, roll the 20-sided die. If that Deepwyrm Drow is on a dungeon space, add 3 to your die roll. If it is on a shadow space, add 6 to your die roll. If you roll a 1-15, roll defence dice normally. If you roll a 16 or higher, ignore all damage that would be inflicted by the attack.

Instead of attacking with an Oathbound Legionnaire, if you control the Oathbound Phalanx and it is adjacent to that Legionnarie onto the Oathbound Phalanx's Army Card.

abilities.name: Disengage
abilities.description: Oathbound Legionnaries are never attacked when leaving an engagement.

abilities.name: Climb X2
abilities.description: When moving up or down levels of terrain, Oathbound Legionnaires may double their Height.

abilities.name: Break The Link
abilities.description: Before taking a turn with the Oathbound Phalanx, you may place any Oathbound Legionnaire figures you control from this Army Card onto any empty spaces adjacent to Oathbound Phalanx. After revealing an Order Marker on the Oathbound Phalanx and after taking a turn with it, you may take a turn with any Oathbound Legionnaires you control

abilities.name: One Falls, The Swarm Survives
abilities.description: When the Oathbound Phalanx would receive one or more wounds, you may remove an Oathbound Legionnaire figure from this Army Card and destroy it. If you do, ignore all wounds the Oathbound Phalanx would have received.

abilities.name: All as One Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 1. Attack 3. You may attack once for each Oathbound Legionnaire figure on this Army Card. When attacking a Small or Medium figure with All As One Special Attack, if you roll a skull on every die, the defending figure cannot roll any defense dice and is immediately destroyed.

abilities.name: Lava Resistant
abilities.description: Obsidian Guards never roll for molten lava damage or lava field damage and they do not have to stop in molten lava spaces.

abilities.name: Lava Throw
abilities.description: When an Obsidian Guard is on a molten lava space it may add 2 to its range.

abilities.name: Water Weakness
abilities.description: An Obsidian Guard on a water space rolls 2 fewer defense dice.

abilities.name: Double Attack
abilities.description: When this Ogre Pulverizer attacks, it may attack one additional time.

abilities.name: Lumbering Bully
abilities.description: When attacking with this Ogre Pulverizer, all excess shields rolled by the defending figure count as unblockable hits inflicted by the defending figure on this Ogre Pulverizer.

abilities.name: Flail Hurricane
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking with this Ogre Warhulk, you must roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 1-10, it may attack normally. If you roll an 11 or higher, instead of attacking normally, it must attack each figure adjacent to it, if possible. Roll each attack separately.

abilities.name: Mine!
abilities.description: When you roll the 20-sided die for a Treasure Glyph trap with this Ogre Warhulk, you must subtract 4 from your die roll.

abilities.name: Circuitry Overload
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking, you must roll the 20 sided die once for each Soulborg figure adjacent to any Omnicron Repulsors you control. If the figure is a squad figure and you roll a 13 or higher, destroy that figure. If the figure is a Hero figure and you roll a 16 or higher, that figure receives a wound. Omicron Repulsors are not affected by Circuitry Overload.

abilities.name: Targeting Beacon
abilities.description: When attacking a non-adjacent figure, all Soulborgs you control who follow Jandar add 1 extra die to their attack if at least one Omnicron Repulsor is adjacent to the defending figure.

abilities.name: EMP Response
abilities.description: If an Omnicron Repulsor you control successfully defends an attack by a Soulborg figure, you must roll the 20 sided die. If you roll a 14 or higher, the attacking figure must immediately end its turn and all order markers must be removed from its Army Card (or cards if your opponent has more than one).

cards.name: Omnicron Snipers

abilities.name: DEADLY SHOT
abilities.description: When rolling attack dice with an Omnicron Sniper, each skull rolled counts for one additional skull.

to

abilities.name: Sonic Blast Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 4. Attack 2. You may attack one additional time with Sonic Blast Special Attack.

abilities.name: Reload
abilities.description: If an Ordo Borealis does not move on its turn, it may add 6 to its Range Value for the rest of that turn.

abilities.name: Red Flag of Fury Aura
abilities.description: If Order Marker 1 is placed on Ornak, then instead of taking that turn with Ornak, you may take a turn with up to 2 Unique Heroes you control who follow Utgar. Ornak cannot be one of the 2 Unique Heroes. Any Unique Hero that is taking a turn instead of Ornak must be within 8 clear sight spaces of Ornak prior to its movement.

abilities.name: Orc Battle Cry
abilities.description: When attacking with any Orc Warrior figures you control adjacent to Ornak, you may roll Utgar Valkyrie dice. Each Utgar symbol rolled counts for an additional skull.

cards.name: Othkurik The Black Dragon

abilities.name: Acid Spray Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 4. Attack 4. Choose a figure to attack. You may also choose up to two other figures adjacent to the targeted figure to be affected by Acid Spray Special Attack. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately.

abilities.name: Lurking Ambush
abilities.description: If Othkurik starts his turn unengaged and on at least one shadow or swamp water space, for this turn add 1 to Othkurik's movement and 3 to his Attack value.

cards.erratas: Othkurik can use his neck spikes as a secondary Target Point.

abilities.name: Tricky Speed 4
abilities.description: If Otonashi starts her turn adjacent to any figure you control with a "Tricky" personality, she may move 4 additional spaces.

abilities.name: Phantom Walk
abilities.description: Otonashi can move through all figures and is never attacked when leaving an engagement.

abilities.name: Attack the Wild 2
abilities.description: When attacking a figure who has a "Wild" personality, Otonashi rolls 2 additional attack dice.

cards.name: Parmenio

abilities.name: DISCIPLINED INFLUENCE
abilities.description: At the start of the game, you may choose any Unique Army Card in your Army. For this game the chosen card’s personality is Disciplined, regardless of what is listed on the card.

abilities.name: SACRED BAND DEFY DEATH 15
abilities.description: When an adjacent Sacred Band figure you control would take 1 or more wounds, roll the 20-sided die before removing that figure. If you roll a 15 or higher, ignore any wounds.

You may inflict more than 1 wound on a single figure using Lolth's Wrath. After using Lolth's Wrath, destroy the chosen Drow figure.

abilities.name: Feral Rage

abilities.name: Jungle Tracking

If you roll a 9 or higher, you may place one of your destroyed Festering Honor Guard on that Hero's Army Card.

abilities.name: Command Familiar

abilities.name: Soul Fury Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 1. Attack 2 + Special. All figures adjacent to Raakchott are affected by Soul Fury Special Attack. Add 1 to Raakchott's attack dice for each Consume Marker on this card. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately. Do not place any Consume Markers on this Army Card while using Soul Fury Special Attack. After using Soul Fury Special Attack, remove one Consume Marker from this Army Card for each figure you attacked this turn.

abilities.name: Terrifying Aura
abilities.description: While opponents' figures are within 4 clear sight spaces of Raelin the Kyrie Warrior, they lower their defense value by 1.

abilities.name: Twist the Blade
abilities.description: If Raelin inflicts at least 1 wound with a normal attack or leaving engagement attack, she inflicts 1 additional wound.

abilities.name: Unyielding
abilities.description: Other players cannont gain control of, move, or take turns with Raelin The Kyrie Warrior.

abilities.name: Whirlwind Assault
abilities.description: Raelin may attack any number of times during her turn. She cannot attack any figure more than once per turn.

abilities.name: Vengeful Swoop 8
abilities.description: Once per turn, after another figure you control within 4 clear sight spaces of Raelin defends against a normal attack from an enemy figure, if you received 1 or more wounds, you may place Raelin on an unoccupied space adjacent to the attacking figure and roll the 20-sided die. If you roll 9 or higher, that figure receives 1 wound. Raelin does not take leaving engagement attacks when moved by Vengeful Swoop.

cards.name: Raelin the Kyrie Warrior (ROTV)

abilities.name: Defensive Aura
abilities.description: All figures you control within 4 clear sight spaces of Raelin add 2 to their defense dice. Raelin's Defensive Aura does not affect Raelin.

abilities.name: Whirlwind Assault

abilities.description: After a Ramosaur Rider makes a normal attack, if there was an equal number of shields in the defense roll as skulls in the attack roll, Ramosaur Rider and the defender must each take 1 wound.

abilities.name: HYPNOSIS
abilities.description: When a Ranoc Viper attacks an adjacent figure, the defender reduces its Defense Value by 1 for each skull in the attacking Viper's roll. Hypnosis does not affect destructible objects.

abilities.name: EVA

abilities.description: After revealing an order marker on a Red Wyrmling Army Card, before taking that Red Wyrmling's turn, you may take a turn with one other Wyrmling you control.

If you do, add 1 to the Attack Value of that Hero and all Revenants of Revna you control until the next time you reveal an Order Marker.

abilities.name: OCCULT BONDING
abilities.description: Before taking a turn with the Revenants of Revna, you may take a turn with a Warrior, Witch, or Scourge Hero you control who follows Revna.

abilities.name: Hero Worship
abilities.description: While a Hero you control who follows Revna attacks with a normal attack or defends, if that Hero is adjacent to one or more Revnan Acolytes you control, you may re-roll 1 die.

abilities.name: Risen By Revna
abilities.description: At the start of each round, before placing Order Markers, you may place one of your destroyed Revnan Acolytes onto an empty space adjacent to a Hero you control who follows Revna.

abilities.description: Attack 3. Line 3.

abilities.name: Einar Warlord Bonding
abilities.description: Before taking a turn with Sacred Band, you may first take a turn with any Warlord you control who follows Einar.

abilities.name: Spear of Summoning

If you roll a 9-20, move the chosen figure to any space adjacent to Saylind. If the summoned figure is engaged, the figure does not receive any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.description: At the start of the round, after rolling Initiative, you may look at all unrevealed Order Markers on 1 enemy Army Card. Then you may move 1 Order Marker from a G.I. JOE or Soldier Army Card you control to another G.I. JOE or Soldier Army Card you control.

abilities.name: LETHAL TO THE BONE
abilities.description: Once per turn, after attacking, you may move Scarlett up to 2 spaces and make 1 normal attack against an adjacent figure.

abilities.name: Double Burst Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 4. Attack 3. When Scavorith, Lord of Ruin attacks with Double Burst Special Attack, he may attack 1 additional time, targeting the same or different figures with each attack.

abilities.name: Battle Surge
abilities.description: After taking a turn with Scavorith, you may reveal an "X" Order Marker on this Army Card to take 1 additional turn with Scavorith. You cannot use Double Burst Special Attack this additional turn. If Scavorith does not attack a figure during the additional turn, Scavorith suffers 1 wound.

abilities.name: CLEAVE TO THE MIGHTY

abilities.name: DRACONIC BREATH SPECIAL ATTACK
abilities.description: Range 4. Attack 2. Only figures within 3 clear sight spaces of the Scions of Icaria’s Liege can be targeted with Draconic Breath Special Attack.

If the chosen figure is engaged when it is moved by Grapple Grab, it will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Thorian Speed
abilities.description: Opponents' figures must be adjacent to Sgt. Drake Alexander to attack him with a normal attack.

abilities.name: Thorian Speed

abilities.name: Pistol Fire Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 5 Attack 3 Drake may not use Pistol Fire Special Attack to attack a figure who follows Jandar.

abilities.name: ARCANE RIPOSTE

abilities.description: Shurrak never rolls for molten lava damage or lava field damage, and he does not have to stop on molten lava spaces.

cards.erratas:
Text change from

Knockback 14: When a small or meduim figure rolls defense dice and is not destroyed by a normal or special attack from Shurrak, immediately roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 14 or higher, you may Knockback that figure by placing it on any empty space within 3 clear sight spaces of Shurrak. The space must be on the same level as or lower than its current location. A figure moved by Knockback never takes any leaving engagement attack. A non-flying figure moved lower by Knockback can recieve any falling damage that may apply.

to

KNOCKBACK: After Shurrak attacks, you may roll the 20-sided die for each small or medium figure Shurrak attacked this turn that was not destroyed by that attack, one at a time. If you roll a 14 or higher, place that figure on any empty space within 3 clear sight spaces of Shurrak. The space must be on the same level as or lower than its current location. A figure moved by Knockback never takes any leaving engagement attacks. A non-flying figure moved lower by Knockback can take any falling damage that may apply.

cards.name: Siege

abilities.name: Crag of Steel
abilities.description: When revealing a numbered order marker on Siege's Army Card, you may also reveal an "X" order marker that is on Siege's Army Card to activate Crag of Steel for the duration of the round. While Crag of Steel is active, add 3 to Siege's Defense value and subtract 2 from Siege's Attack and Move values. When Siege attacks while Crag of Steel is active, he may attack any or all adjacent to him. Roll each attack separately.

cards.erratas: Siege’s cloak is a hit zone.

abilities.name: A Coward's Reward
abilities.description: Sir Denrick rolls one additional die against each figure leaving an engagement with him.

abilities.name: Giant Killer
abilities.description: When Sir Denrick attacks huge figures, add 2 attack dice.

cards.name: Sir Dupuis

abilities.name: Knight's Courage
abilities.description: Add 1 to Sir Dupuis' attack dice for every Knight you control within 4 clear sight spaces of Sir Dupuis up to a maximum of +3 dice.

abilities.name: TACTICAL DISENGAGEMENT 7
abilities.description: If Sir Dupuis would take 1 or more wounds from a leaving engagement attack, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 7 or higher, ignore those wounds.

abilities.name: Chalice of Fortitude
abilities.description: If Sir Dupuis has 4 or more wounds on his Army Card, add 1 to his defense dice.

cards.erratas:
Sir Dupuis’ shield is not a Hit Zone.

Text changed from

Tactical Disengagement 7: When Sir Dupuis receives one or more wounds from a leaving engagement attack, immediately roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 7 or higher, ignore any wounds from that leaving engagement attack.

TACTICAL DISENGAGEMENT 7: If Sir Dupuis would take 1 or more wounds from a leaving engagement attack, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 7 or higher, ignore those wounds.

cards.name: Sir Gilbert

abilities.name: Jandar's Dispatch
abilities.description: After you take a turn with Sir Gilbert, roll 12 Jandar Valkyrie Dice. You may move up to 4 squad figures you control who follow Jandar up to X spaces. X equals the number of Jandar symbols rolled. Any squad figures moved with Jandar’s Dispatch must be within 8 clear sight spaces of Sir Gilbert prior to moving.

abilities.name: Attack Aura 1
abilities.description: All friendly figures adjacent to Sir Gilbert with a range of 1 add 1 die to their normal attack.

cards.erratas: Increased Army Card point value from 105 to 160 points.

abilities.name: Blind Rage Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 1 Attack 3 If Sir Hawthorne rolls at least 2 skulls with his Blind Rage Special Attack, Sir Hawthorne may attack again with his Blind Rage Special Attack. Sir Hawthorne may continue to attack with his Blind Rage Special Attack until he rolls fewer than 2 skulls.

abilities.name: Stab in the Back
abilities.description: After you take a turn with Sir Hawthorne, you must roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 1, choose an opponent. That opponent now controls Sir Hawthorne. Remove any order markers on this Army Card, then give the card to that opponent.

abilities.name: PHEROMONE COORDINATION
abilities.description: Before taking a turn with Skordyre Infantry, you may take turns with up to 2 Skordyre or Insect Common Heroes you control with different names or 1 Skordyre or Insect Unique Hero you control.

abilities.name: TEEMING
abilities.description: After a Skordyre Infantry figure you control is destroyed by a normal attack from an enemy figure, you may move 1 unengaged Common Skordyre or Insect figure you control up to 5 spaces even if all of your Skordyre Soldiers are destroyed.

abilities.name: INSECTOID SWARM
abilities.description: When a Skordyre Infantry attacks a figure engaged with at least 2 other Skordyre or Insect figures you control, add 1 to its Attack Value.

abilities.name: ASS
abilities.description: ASSINATE 2Snake Eyes adds 2 to his Attack Value when attacking an enemy figure that is not adjacent to any other enemy figures.

abilities.name: EVA
abilities.description: SIVE 2Snake Eyes increases his Defense Value by 2 when defending against a non-adjacent figure.

abilities.name: PHANTOM WALK
abilities.description: Snake Eyes can move through all figures and never takes leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Healing Wing 13
abilities.description: After moving nromally with Sonlen, you may choose a figure with one or more wounds that is adjacent to Sonlen or that he passed over during his movement this turn and roll a 20-sided die. If you roll a 13 or higher, remove one Wound Marker from that figure.

abilities.name: Dragon Assault
abilities.description: When Sonlen attacks an adjacent figure or destructible object, he may attack one additional time. If Sonlen used his Flying Special Power this turn, roll 1 addtional Combat Die on the first attack.

cards.name: Sonlen (SotM)

abilities.name: DRAGON HEALING
abilities.description: At the start of Sonlen’s turn, you may choose Sonlen or a Hero figure within 4 clear sight spaces of Sonlen. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 15 or higher, remove one Wound Marker from the chosen Hero’s Army Card.

abilities.name: Dragon Swoop
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking, you may choose any figure within 4 clear sight spaces of Sonlen. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 15 or higher, the chosen figure receives one wound.

cards.erratas:
Text change from

Dragon Healing: Before moving, you may choose a wounded Hero figure within 4 clear sight spaces of Sonlen. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 15 or higher, remove one Wound Marker from the chosen Hero's Army Card. Sonlen's Dragon can use its Dragon Healing on Sonlen.

to

DRAGON HEALING: At the start of Sonlen’s turn, you may choose Sonlen or a Hero figure within 4 clear sight spaces of Sonlen. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 15 or higher, remove one Wound Marker from the chosen Hero’s Army Card.

abilities.name: Life Drain
abilities.description: Each time Sonya Esenwein destroys a figure, you may remove a wound marker from this Army Card. Sonya Esenwein cannot Life Drain Destructible Objects.

abilities.name: Eternal Strength
abilities.description: Anytime you roll the 20-sided die for Cyprien Esenwein’s Chilling Touch, you may add 2 to your die roll.

abilities.name: Eternal Heartbreak
abilities.description: If you control Cyprien Esenwein and he is destroyed, Sonya Esenwein immediately receives 2 wounds.

abilities.name: Gladiator Inspiration
abilities.description: If all Order Markers for a round are placed on Gladiator Army Cards, and at least one Order Marker is placed on Spartacus, then all Gladiators you control (except Spartacus) become inspired. Inspired Gladiators add one to their Move number and add 1 extra attack die and defense die for the rest of the round.

abilities.name: CORROSIVE BILE
abilities.description: After a Spitting Hive Soldier attacks a figure or destructible object, that figure or destructible object reduces its Defense Value by 1 until the next time any player reveals an Order Marker.

abilities.name: NANITE SMOKE GRENADE
abilities.description: Start the game with 3 shadow tiles on this Army Card. At the end of Storm Shadow's turn, you may place a shadow tile from this card onto the battlefield within 3 clear sight spaces of Storm Shadow if the tile fits normally there.

abilities.name: WHIRLWIND ASSAULT
abilities.description: Storm Shadow may attack any number of times during his turn. He cannot attack any figure more than once per turn.

abilities.name: PHANTOM WALK
abilities.description: Storm Shadow can move through all figures and never takes leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Hive Supremecy
abilities.description: Anytime you roll the 20-sided die for a Marro or Wulsinu Army Card, you may add 1 to your die roll.

abilities.name: Stare of Stone
abilities.description: Instead of attacking, choose any figure within 4 clear sight spaces of Sudema. Roll the 20-sided die. If the chosen figure is a Squad figure and you roll a 7 or higher, destroy it. If the chosen figure if a Hero figure and you roll a 17 or higher, destroy the chosen Hero.

cards.name: Sujoah

abilities.description: - If you roll a 10–19, add 1 to the number of wounds inflicted and roll again for Poison Damage.- If you roll a 20, destroy the defending figure.

cards.name: Swog Rider

abilities.name: Disengage
abilities.description: Swog Rider is never attacked when leaving an engagement.

abilities.name: ORC ARCHER ENHANCEMENT
abilities.description: All friendly Orc Archers add 1 to their Attack and Defense Values for each adjacent Swog Rider you control.

cards.erratas:

to

ORC ARCHER ENHANCEMENT: All friendly Orc Archers add 1 to their Attack and Defense Values for each adjacent Swog Rider you control.

abilities.name: VOLLEY UNTO HIMSELF
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking, you may reduce Syvarris' Range Value to 6 to make up to 2 normal attacks this turn. Or, you may reduce it to 3 to make up to 3 normal attacks this turn.

abilities.name: Double Attack
abilities.description: When Syvarris attacks, he may attack one additional time.

cards.name: Taelord the Kyrie Warrior

abilities.name: Attack Aura
abilities.description: All figures you control within 4 clear sight spaces of Taelord get +1 to attack. Taelord's Attack Aura does not affect Taelord.

abilities.name: Stealth Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Taelord’s movement, ignore elevations. Taelord may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Taelord starts to fly, if he is engaged he will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

cards.erratas: Ability should be 'Stealth Flying' instead of 'Flying'

cards.name: Tagawa Samurai

abilities.name: COUNTER STRIKE
abilities.description: When Tagawa Samurai successfully defend against a normal attack from an adjacent attacking figure that is not a Samurai, the attacking figure takes 1 wound for each excess shield.

abilities.name: Bloodlust
abilities.description: For every opponent's figure a Tagawa Samurai destroys, place a purple Experience Marker on this card. When attacking with Tagawa Samurai, roll one additional attack die for each Experience Marker on this card. A maximum of 3 Experience Markers can be placed on this card.

cards.name: Tandros Kreel

abilities.name: Cleave
abilities.description: When Tandros Kreel attacks an adjacent figure, you may choose one Squad figure that is also adjacent to Tandros Kreel. If the defending figure recieves any wounds from Tandros Kreel's attack, the chosen figure recieves one wound.

abilities.name: Combat Challenge
abilities.description: If an opponent's figure that is adjacent to Tandros Kreel attacks with a normal or special attack, it must attack Tandros Kreel.

abilities.name: Nage-Waza 9
abilities.description: Before attacking with a Tanuk Trickster, you may choose an adjacent enemy Small or Medium figure and roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 9 or higher, you may move the chosen figure 1 space. Tanuki Tricksters never make leaving engagement attacks against figures moved by Nage-Waza.

abilities.name: Tanuk Aruki
abilities.description: After revealing an Order Marker on this Army Card and tacking a turn with the Tanuk Tricksters, you may move up to 2 Small or Medium Vorid or Ninja figures you control that did not move this turn up to 3 spaces each.

abilities.name: Phantom Walk
abilities.description: Tanuki Tricksters can move through all figures and are never attacked when leaving an engagement.

abilities.name: Berserker Charge
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 15 or higher, you may move all Tarn Viking Warriors again.

cards.name: Templar Cavalry

abilities.name: Galloping Charge
abilities.description: A Templar Cavalry Knight receives 2 additional dice when attacking any figure that was at least 4 hexes away at the start of his turn.

abilities.name: Dismiss the Rabble
abilities.description: When rolling defense dice against adjacent small or medium Squad figures, Templar Cavalry Knights receive 1 additional defense dice.

abilities.name: Righteous Smite
abilities.description: When attacking an opponent's figure who follows Utgar; Templar Cavalry receive 1 additional attack die.

cards.erratas: The symbol on the Templar Cavalry card should be Jandar, not Einar

abilities.name: Dwarven Strategic Bonding
abilities.description: Before taking a turn with The Axegrinders of Burning Forge, you may first take a turn with any Dwarf Hero you control. If you do not take a turn with any Dwarf Hero you control, add 2 to the Axegrinder's movement number.

abilities.name: Fearless Advantage
abilities.description: An Axegrinder of Burning Forge rolls an additional die when attacking or defending against large or huge figures.

abilities.name: Climb X2
abilities.description: When moving up or down levels of terrain, The Axegrinders of Burning Forge may double their height.

abilities.name: Double Attack
abilities.description: When each member of the Einar Imperium attacks, he may attack one additional time.

abilities.name: Stealth Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for the Einar Imperium's movement, ignore elevations. The Einar Imperium may fly over water without stopping, pass over obstacles such as ruins. When a member of the Einar Imperium starts to fly, if he is engaged he will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: SUMMON THE KRAKEN
abilities.description: The Kraken does not start the game on the battlefield. After revealing a numbered Order Marker on a Unique or Unfathomable Hero you control you may place 1 figure from this Squad that has not been destroyed on an empty space adjacent to that Hero.

abilities.name: COMMAND THE KRAKEN
abilities.description: Once per round, instead of taking a turn with a Unique or Unfathomable Hero you control, you may take a turn with The Kraken instead.

abilities.name: WARP SPACE
abilities.description: Instead of moving normally with 1 of The Kraken's figures, you may place that figure on an empty space within 4 spaces of that figure. If it is engaged when it starts to Warp Space, it will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Carry
abilities.description: Before moving Theracus, choose an unengaged friendly small or medium figure adjacent to Thercus. After you move Theracus, place the chosen figure adjacent to Theracus.

abilities.name: Defensive Aura 1
abilities.description: All friendly figures adjacent to Thorgrim add 1 die to their defense.

abilities.name: Warrior's Armor Spirit 1
abilities.description: When Thorgrim is destroyed, place this figure on any unique Army Card. Thorgrim's Spirit adds 1 to the defense number on that card.

abilities.name: RAGTAG ARMADA
abilities.description: After revealing an Order Marker on and before taking a turn with Thormun, you may place a gold Command Marker on the Army Card of another Hero you control to immediately take a turn with that Hero. You may not place a Command Marker on the Army Card of a figure with the same Affiliation as a Hero you control that already has a Command Marker. At the end of the round, remove all of your Command Markers.

abilities.name: PIRATE KING
abilities.description: Thormun's Class is also Pirate, Captain, and King.

abilities.name: SWASHBUCKLER
abilities.description: After attacking with Thormun, you may attack an adjacent figure 1 additional time. Thormun's Attack Value is increased by 2 for the second attack.

abilities.name: Maddening Chitter 14
abilities.description: Once per round, before taking a turn with the Thyraxis Dragoon, you may choose an enemy figure within 6 clear sight spaces of Thyraxis and roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 14 or higher, you may look at on unrevealed Order Marker on that figure's Army Card. You may then chooe any other figure controlled by the same player and move the Order Marker to that figure's Army Card.

abilities.name: Battle Frenzy 16
abilities.description: After attacking with Thyraxis Dragoon, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 16 or higher, you may attack again with Thyraxis.

abilities.name: Trample Stomp
abilities.description: At any point while moving, Tor-Kul-Na may choose a small or medium figure that is adjacent, on the same level, and on a space where Tor-Kul-Na may end his movement. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll 1-7, the figure is safe and Tor-Kul-Na's movement ends. If you roll 8-20, the chosen figure receives one wound. If the wound destroys the figure, move Tor-Kul-Na onto the space occupied, and you may continue Tor-Kul-Na's movement. If the chosen figure is not destroyed, Tor-Kul-Na's movement ends. Tor-Kul-Na must be on a space where he can end movement each time he uses this power.

cards.name: Torin

abilities.name: Battle Axe
abilities.description: If Torin is attacking a small or medium figure, add 2 dice to Torin's attack.

abilities.name: EVIL EYE PROTECTION
abilities.description: When Torin or an adjacent friendly Small or Medium Utgar figure successfully defends against a normal attack from a non-adjacent figure, the attacking figure takes 1 wound for each excess shield.

abilities.name: Disengage
abilities.description: Tornak is never attacked when leaving an engagement.

abilities.name: Orc Warrior Enhancement
abilities.description: All friendly Orc Warriors adjacent to Tornak receive an additional attack die and an additional defense die.

abilities.name: Mind Blast Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 3. Attack 3. Tul-Bak-Ra does not need clear line of sight to attack with the Mind Blast Special Attack.

abilities.name: Teleportation
abilities.description: Instead of moving Tul-Bak-Ra normally, you may choose any empty space that is on the same level and within 10 spaces of Tul-Bak-Ra. Place Tul-Bak-Ra on the chosen space. When Tul-Bak-Ra starts to teleport, if he is engaged he will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Teleport Reinforments
abilities.description: When Tul-Bak-Ra receives one or more wounds from an opposing figure's Normal or Special attack but is not destroyed, you may choose one friendly Marro Squad figure for every wound Tul-Bak-Ra just received. Place the chosen figure(s) on any empty space(s) adjacent to Tul-Bak-Ra. If the teleported figure(s) are engaged, they will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

cards.name: Ulginesh

abilities.name: MIND LINK
abilities.description: After revealing an Order Marker on Ulginesh, instead of taking a turn with him, you may take a turn with up to 2 other Elf Wizards you control. Any Elf Wizard that is taking a turn instead of Ulginesh must be within 6 clear sight spaces of Ulginesh before moving.

cards.erratas:
Text change from

Mind Link: Instead of taking a turn with Ulginesh, you may take a turn with up to 2 different Elf Wizards you control. Ulginesh cannot be one of the 2 Elf Wizards. Any Elf Wizard that is taking a turn instead of Ulginesh must be within 6 clear sight spaces of Ulginesh before moving.

to

MIND LINK: After revealing an Order Marker on Ulginesh, instead of taking a turn with him, you may take a turn with up to 2 other Elf Wizards you control. Any Elf Wizard that is taking a turn instead of Ulginesh must be within 6 clear sight spaces of Ulginesh before moving.

abilities.name: First Assault 3
abilities.description: When attacking with Valguard, if the defending figure was not adjacent to Valguard at the start of this turn, Valguard receives 3 additional attack dice.

abilities.name: Berserker Charge Enhancement
abilities.description: Add 1 to your die roll when you roll for the Berserker Charge power on any Army Card.

abilities.name: Slither
abilities.description: Venoc Vipers do not have to stop their movement when entering water spaces.

abilities.name: Frenzy
abilities.description: After you take a turn with Venoc Vipers; roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 16 or higher you may take another turn with Venoc Vipers.

abilities.name: Scout Leadership
abilities.description: All Scouts you control can move an additional 2 spaces.

abilities.name: Frenzy Enhancement
abilities.description: Add 1 to your die roll when you roll for the Frenzy power on any Army Card.

abilities.name: Slither
abilities.description: Venoc Warlord does not have to stop his movement when entering water spaces.

abilities.name: Glider Landing
abilities.description: Vorid Glide Strikers do not start the game on the battlefield. Before revealing an Order Marker on this Army Card, you may palce on Glide Striker from this card that has not been destroyed onto an empty space. You cannont place that figure adjacent to other figures. The placed figure cannot move normally this turn.

abilities.name: Evasive 1
abilities.description: Vorid Glide STrikers increase their Defense Value by 1 when defending against a non-adjacent figure.

abilities.name: SHARP THORNS
abilities.description: If an enemy Small or Medium figure moves onto a space adjacent to Vrono the Brambletooth where that figure could end its movement, you may roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 12 or higher, the figure ends its movement and lowers its Attack Value by 1 until the end of the current turn. If you roll an 18 or higher, the figure also receives one wound.

abilities.name: Heart Finder Spear 12
abilities.description: Before attacking with Queen Qhyrion, you may roll 20-sided die. If you roll a 12 or higher, a figure attacked by Queen Qhyrion may roll no more than 1 die for defense.

abilities.name: Evisceraxe Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 1. Attack 5. The Evisceraxe Special Attack cannot be used on small figures.

abilities.name: Guard Leadership
abilities.description: All Guards you control move one additional space.

abilities.name: Tactical Switch
abilities.description: When a Warforged Soldier you control attacks an opponent's small or medium figure, you may switch that Warforged Soldier with the defending figure. After switching spaces, the Warforged Soldier must continue that attack, if possible, and cannot attack any other figure this turn. Figures moved by Tactical Switch never take any leaving engagement attacks. An opponent's figure may be moved by Tactical Switch only once per turn.

abilities.name: Warforged Resolve
abilities.description: When rolling defense dice against a normal or special attack, a Warforged Soldier always adds 1 automatic shield to whatever is rolled.

abilities.name: Defensive Agility
abilities.description: When a Warrior of Ashra rolls defense dice against a normal attack from an adjacent figure, one shield will block all damage.

abilities.name: Water Mastery
abilities.description: While a Water Elemental is on a water space, add 1 to its Attack and Defense.

abilities.name: Water Tunnel
abilities.description: If a Water Elemental ends its normal movement on a water space, you may immediately place it on any empty same-level water space that is within 5 spaces. If a Water Elemental is engaged when it starts its Water Tunnel, it will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Lycanthropy
abilities.description: This Werewolf Lord starts the game with 3 green Lycanthropy Markers on its Army Card. If an opponent's Unique Hero receives at least 1 wound from this Werewolf Lord, you may place a Lycanthropy Marker on that figure's Army Card. For the duration of the game, that figure loses its Species, Class, and Personality. Instead, it has the following characteristic Species - Hybrid, Class - Hunter, Personality - Tormented. Lycanthropy never affects Constructs, Lycanthropes, Soulborgs, and Destructible Objects.

abilities.name: Moon Frenzy
abilities.description: After revealing an Order Marker on this Werewolf Lord, before taking this Werewolf Lord's turn, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll an 11 or higher, you may first take a turn with any Hybrid Hero in play. If you take a turn with an opponent's Hybrid Hero, you control that Hero for the duration of its turn. At the end of its turn, control of the Hybrid Hero returns to its previous owner. All Order Markers that were on the figure's Army Card will stay on the Army Card.

abilities.name: Fledgling Ice Shards Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 5 Attack 2 When a White Wyrmling attacks with its Fledgling Ice Shards Special Attack, it may attack 1 additional time. It cannot attack the same figure more than once this turn.

abilities.name: Wyrmling Bonding
abilities.description: After revealing an order marker on a White Wyrmling Army Card, before taking that White Wyrmling's turn, you may take a turn with one other Wyrmling you control.

abilities.name: Glide In 13
abilities.description: Tuck Harrington does not start the game on the battlefield. If Harrigan has not been placed on the battlefield, before revealing a numbered Order Marker, you may roll the 20-sided die. If you roll 13 or higher, place Harrigan on an empty space. You cannon place Harrigan adjacent to other figures. Then you may move any or all of your unrevealed Order Markers to this Army Card.

abilities.name: Evasive 1
abilities.description: Harrigan increases his Defense Value by 1 when defending against a non-adjacent figure.

abilities.name: Coil Crush
abilities.description: When attacking a small, medium or large figure, if Wo-Sa-Ga inflicts at least 2 wounds, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 15 or higher, destroy the defending figure.

abilities.name: Slither
abilities.description: Wo-Sa-Ga does not have to stop her movement when entering water spaces.

abilities.name: Darklord Bonding
abilities.description: Before taking a turn with Wolves of Badru, you may first take a turn with any Darklord you control.

abilities.name: Climb 2X
abilities.description: When moving up or down levels of terrain, Wolves of Badru may double their height.

abilities.name: Pounce Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 3 Attack 5 A Wolf of Badru that moved but did not attack normally may use Pounce Special Attack. To pounce, choose a non-adjacent small or medium figure whose base is not higher or lower than 5 levels from the base of the attacking Wolf. If the figure is destroyed, immediately place the attacking Wolf on the space the figure occupied. If the figure is not destroyed, destroy the attacking Wolf.

abilities.name: Talon Grab
abilities.description: While this Wyvern is flying, you may choose one opponent's small or medium figure that it passed over this turn. Place the chosen figure on an empty same-level space adjacent to this Wyvern at the end of its move. If the chosen figure is engaged when it is moved by Talon Grab, it will not take any leaving engagement attacks. Figures under overhangs can never be moved by Talon Grab.

abilities.name: Venomous Sting
abilities.description: When rolling attack dice, if this Wyvern rolls a skull on every die, the defending figure can not roll defense dice. Venomous Sting does not affect destructible objects.

cards.name: Xenithrax the Vinewaver

abilities.name: Summon Vines
abilities.description: Xenithrax starts the game with three Xenithrax Vines Glyphs on this Army Card. Once per round, after moving and before attacking, Xenithrax may choose an empty space within 4 spaces of Xenithrax and place a Xenithrax Vines Glyph from this Army Card onto that space.

abilities.name: Erupting Earth Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 5 + Special. Attack 4 - Special.The first target of Erupting Earth Special Attack must be within a Range of 5. After attacking with Erupting Earth Special Attack, you may choose a figure that was adjacent to the defending figure at the beginning of that attack and attack that chosen figure, rolling one fewer attack die. You may continue attacking with Erupting Earth Special Attack in this manner, rolling one fewer attack die than the previous, up to a total of four attacks. A figure cannot be attacked more than once in a turn with Erupting Earth Special Attack.

cards.erratas: Xenithrax can use her horns as a secondary Target Point.

cards.name: Xiamara the Kyrie Warrior

abilities.name: AMULET OF PAIVATAR
abilities.description: When a Kyrie you control who follows Ullar within 6 clear sight spaces of Xiamara the Kyrie Warrior would receive 1 or more wounds, you may roll the 20-sided die. If you roll an 8–16, ignore all but 1 wound. If you roll a 17 or higher, ignore all wounds. Amulet of Paivatar does not affect Xiamara.

abilities.name: Majestic Fires Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 7 Attack 3 Choose a figure to attack. Any figures adjacent to the targeted figure are also affected by Majestic Fires Special Attack. Common Squad figures roll 2 less defense dice against Majestic Fires Special Attack. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately. Zelrig cannot be affected by his own Majestic Fires Special Attack.

cards.name: Zetacron

abilities.name: DEADLY SHOT
abilities.description: When rolling attack dice with Zetracron, each skull rolled counts for one additional skull.

cards.erratas:

abilities.name: Zettian Targeting
abilities.description: When attacking, if your second Zettian Guard attacks the same figure as the first Zettian Guard, add one attack die to the second Zettian Guard's attack.

abilities.name: Horde Movement
abilities.description: You may move up to 6. Zombies of Morindan that you control each turn. However, you may attack with only 3 Zombies of Morindan. You may attack with any 3 Zombies of Morindan, even Zombies of Morindan that you did not move this turn.

abilities.name: Zombie Onslaught Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 1. Attack 6. Three Zombies of Morindan on the same level may combine their attacks and roll their attack dice as one attack. All Zombies of Morindan in the attack must be engaged to the targeted figure.

abilities.name: Zombies Rise Again
abilities.description: If a Zombie of Morindan that you control destroys an opponent's small or medium figure, replace that figure immediately, if possible, with one of your own previously destroyed Zombies of Morindan. Newly placed Zombies of Morindan cannot attack this turn. Undead are not affected by Zombies Rise Again.
